The '''M-12''' was an ''Imperial''-class [[sweep bomb]] used for heavy demolition and leveling for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] or, in some cases, their [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|manufacturer's]] director, [[Kuat of Kuat/Legends|Kuat of Kuat]]. The high-pressure explosive originally used a removable [[atmospheric phase-change detonator]].

A failure rate of nearly ten percent caused the line to be discontinued, forcing the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] to update to a more reliable integrated gravity-wave system inside the bomb itself.

{{Weapon-stub}}
